problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Metal-organic. Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
